cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the passage and the question. The question is asking which statement is true based on the passage. Let's go through each option one by one. Option A: "Last fall, there was the second lowest number of grown salmon returning on record." The passage says, "only about 90,000 adult salmon returned to the Central Valley last fall—the second lowest number on record..." So this matches directly. So A is likely correct. Option B: "The salmon migrates to the ocean when they grow up." The passage states, "wild salmon are born in streams and rivers, migrate to the ocean when they're juveniles..." So they migrate when they're juveniles, not when they grow up. So B is incorrect. Option C: "The farm-raised salmon is not as delicious and nutrients as the wild salmon." The passage mentions that there will still be abundant supplies of farm-raised salmon, but doesn't compare their taste or nutrition. So C is not mentioned and not true based on the passage.
